meta.title: Actio workflow (.actio.yml)
meta.description: Source language for the Actio transpiler: a standard GitHub Actions workflow plus Actio macro keywords (fragments/inject, retry, dynamic_matrix, fallback) that compile into ordinary workflow YAML. Inherits GitHub's official workflow schema, so every normal Actions field still validates. See https://github.com/austenstone/actio.
meta.$comment: GENERATED FILE — do not edit by hand. Built by packages/core/schema/build.mjs from github-workflow.json (vendored from SchemaStore, https://json.schemastore.org/github-workflow.json, Apache-2.0) plus the Actio macro overlay in this directory. Run `npm run schema:build` to regenerate.

actioRetry.title: retry (Actio macro)
actioRetry.description: Actio macro. Retry a flaky step with optional backoff; expands into a chain of conditional attempts where attempt N runs only if attempt N-1 failed. Shorthand `retry: 3` is the same as `retry: { attempts: 3 }`.

delay.description: Backoff between attempts: a duration like "10s", "2m", "1h", or a number of seconds. Injects `sleep` steps between attempts.

actioFallback.title: fallback (Actio macro)
actioFallback.description: Actio macro. A native try/catch. Default (notify): the fallback runs on failure via `if: failure()` but the job still fails. With `recover: true` the guarded step gets `continue-on-error: true` and the fallback keys off `outcome`, so the job can pass.

oneOf.description: Fallback steps (notify mode). The job still fails.

steps.description: Steps to run when the guarded step or job fails.

recover.description: When true, swallow the guarded failure (continue-on-error) so the job can continue. Step-level only; ignored on job-level fallback.

actioDynamicMatrix.title: dynamic_matrix (Actio macro)
actioDynamicMatrix.description: Actio macro. Build a matrix at runtime: `script` prints a JSON array (or `{include:[...]}`) to stdout. Actio generates a setup job that publishes the JSON and wires this job to consume it via `fromJSON()` with a fail-fast:false default and an empty-matrix guard.

script.description: Command or local script path that prints a JSON array (or `{"include":[...]}`) to stdout.

alias.description: Wrap a scalar JSON array under `matrix.<alias>` (referenced as `${{ matrix.<alias> }}`). Omit for raw `{include:[...]}` mode.

runs-on.description: Runner for the generated setup job. Defaults to the job's `runs-on`, else `ubuntu-latest`.

shell.description: Shell used to run `script` in the setup job.

checkout.description: Check out the repository in the setup job. Defaults to true when `script` is a local path.

fail-fast.description: Value for `strategy.fail-fast` on the matrix job. Defaults to false.

id.description: Override the generated setup job id.

fragments.description: Actio macro. Reusable, named lists of steps. Splice a fragment into a job with `- inject: <name>`. The `fragments` key is stripped from the generated workflow.

additionalProperties.description: An ordered list of steps to inject wherever this fragment is referenced.

inject.description: Actio macro. Splice in the steps of the named fragment (defined under top-level `fragments:`) at this position. Replaced inline by `actio build`.
